description: Verso: Legal agreement. Probably in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe. Avigayil bt. Eliyya ha-Kohen gives her husband David b. Eliyya the right to remarry his divorcee Ḥasana bt. Yehuda. The bottom of the document is not preserved, so we do not know if there are signatures or not. This document may be the notes of the scribe or the court rather than the legal agreement itself. On recto (see separate record) there is a fragment from a letter by an untrained hand.
tags: Halfon b. Menashshe, marital reconciliation, Marriage
description_he: הסכם משפטי. אביגיל בת אליה הכהן מאפשרת לבעלה דוד בן אליה לשאת מחדש את גרושתו חסנה בת יהודה.
